summary: DHH celebrates Rails World in Amsterdam selling out in under 45 minutes, calling it validation for the newly formed Rails Foundation and its corporate backers. He frames this as a triumphant moment for the Rails ecosystem, noting there hasn't been a major European Rails conference since 2008. The sellout validates the Foundation's decision to prioritize a conference series as its first major project. DHH positions this as a fresh start that leaves past community conflicts behind, with plans to expand the conference series in 2024.
key_points: Rails World in Amsterdam sold out in under 45 minutes, demonstrating strong pent-up demand for a major European Rails conference
The Rails Foundation, backed by companies like Shopify, GitHub, and 37signals, is validated by the conference's success as its first major undertaking
DHH frames the event as moving past old community squabbles and the end of RailsConf, positioning the Foundation as the new institutional home for Rails events
The conference coincides with Rails' 20th anniversary, and DHH uses the milestone to project momentum and longevity for the framework
money_quotes: There hasn't been a major, dedicated Rails conference in Europe since 2008, so perhaps it's no surprise that there was pent-up demand.
What an awesome validation that companies like Cookpad, Doximity, Fleetio, GitHub, Intercom, Procore, Shopify, and 37signals were right to back a new institution.
To have all of this come together, with Rails World, with the Rails Foundation, in the year we'll celebrate the 20th anniversary of the framework, is just icing on the birthday cake.
Especially because this feels like just the beginning.
Personally, it's gratifying to see that we've been able to leave old squabbles behind, route around the nonsense, and get back to the joyful collaboration on this fantastic framework.
I seriously feel #blessed to continue working with such an incredible ecosystem of developers after having spent literally half my life in its service. Bring on the next twenty years!
key_insight: The rapid sellout of Rails World validates the Rails Foundation's corporate-backed institutional model as the right path forward for the framework's community and events.
